subject: Introducing first-class support for any agent in Warp
body_preview:
Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode вҖ” now with a full development environment around them. В 

Hey there,

Warp now has first-class support for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, and any other coding agent CLI. The same code review, notifications, and tooling we built for Warp's agent now works with yours, too.

subject: Your Warp teamвҖҷs monthly spend limit has been updated
body_preview:
Image

Your teamвҖҷs monthly spend limit has been updated to $100.00.

This limit controls the maximum amount your team can spend on Reload Credits ( https://docs.warp.dev/support-and-billing/plans-and-pricing/reload-credits-add-on-credits ) each month. Once the limit is reached, no additional Reload Credit purchases (manual or automatic) will process until:

* The next calendar month begins, or
* You update your limit again in Settings > Billing and usage

You can adjust your spend limit anytime
